issue_description: Hello, I'm having trouble with my account. My username is <PERSON> and my account number is 1234-5678-9012-3456. Please contact me at <PERSON>@<ORGANIZATION> or call me at +1-555-123-4567.

conversations.message: Hi, I need help with my account. My email is <PERSON>@<ORGANIZATION> and my phone is +1-555-123-4567.
Hello <PERSON>, I'll help you. I can see your account details. Let me check your account number 1234-5678-9012-3456.
Thanks <PERSON>. My address is 123 <LOCATION>, <LOCATION>, <LOCATION> 10001 if you need to send anything.
